title: ipomoea collinsiae
intro: Ipomoea collinsiae, also known as the Hawaiian morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea collinsiae include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea collinsiae can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
